title: VoidExp ResourcePack
description: Resource pack inspired by Mark101's ARG, containing blocks inspired from it.
body:
This description is still mostly wip, but yea anyways

first of all, since this resourcepack is based off golden age, you HAVE to have your resourcepacks order to be like that:

![resourcepack order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e875a905306ec4845a6693ef7c862a459cf9b41.png)

second of all, the blocks and all that are modified

red nether bricks blocks: protected void (whatever they are called I forgot)

bamboo door: protected void door

command block (all types): console

glowstone: protected void lights

black concrete: pitch black block

irons bars: protected void bars

gold ingot/raw: null cheese (don't ask why, also its not edible)

ender chest: Protected Void Chest

thats all there is for now, have fun

thanks to mark101 for making his webseries:
https://www.youtube.com/@unintelligible-synapse

and also heres the link to golden age (and alpha one since its what I used for this resource pack):

Base: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days

Alpha: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days-alpha
